overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence showing an armored character walking along a waterfront promenade in a post-apocalyptic urban environment. The character moves from an open waterfront view of ruined skyscrapers to an enclosed walkway alongside industrial buildings and abandoned train cars.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with view of ruined city skyline

agents.ego_description: armored character walking steadily along the waterfront balustrade, surveying the ruined cityscape across the water

entered.detail: ornate stone railing with arched openings running along the water's edge
calm water reflecting the overcast sky and distant buildings
cluster of damaged art deco and modernist skyscrapers across the water
suspension bridge cables visible between the towers
leafless trees indicating autumn or winter

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a gloomy waterfront promenade with an armored character walking along a stone balustrade. Across the calm water, a skyline of ruined skyscrapers rises against an overcast sky. The camera follows smoothly from behind as the character moves forward, with bare trees visible on the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial waterfront walkway alongside derelict building

events.description: character turns corner from open waterfront to enclosed walkway alongside tall industrial building

agents.ego_description: character turns right along the building corner and continues walking past abandoned yellow train cars and shipping containers

entered.detail: massive dark brick industrial building wall with small windows
rusted yellow and black striped abandoned train car or tram
angled metal ramp leading up to the train car
stack of weathered blue cargo containers

segments.scene_description: The character turns right around a corner, transitioning from the open waterfront to a narrow walkway alongside a massive dark industrial building. The view of the ruined skyline is replaced by the building's imposing wall and abandoned yellow train cars. The character continues past shipping containers and industrial debris as the camera follows the new path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an open, gloomy waterfront view into a claustrophobic industrial corridor. It begins behind an armored character walking along a stone balustrade, with a skyline of ruined skyscrapers looming across the calm water under an overcast sky. As the character moves forward past bare trees, the camera follows a right turn around a corner, causing the expansive vista to vanish. The scene then shifts to a narrow walkway where the imposing wall of a dark industrial building replaces the horizon, framing the path with abandoned yellow train cars. Finally, the camera continues its forward progression past shipping containers and scattered industrial debris, deepening the sense of enclosure.
